title: AHOL Tier 1 Orchestrator Output
description: Schema for the CHAMPION.md-adjacent JSON record written by the AHOL Tier 1 orchestrator at the end of a round. The orchestrator WRITES this payload to disk alongside CHAMPION.md and the round summary; it does NOT return this object to any parent (Tier 1 is the top of the tree). This schema is used to validate the serialized record before the orchestrator exits.

round_id.description: Identifier for this benchmark round. Expected to be an ISO-8601-like timestamp string (for example 2026-04-23T10:15:00Z) so rounds sort lexicographically by time.

champion_variant_id.description: Variant ID of the new champion selected this round, or null if no variant dethroned the prior champion (sigma or cost gate failed, or no variant improved on prior champion_score).

champion_score.description: Score of the champion for this round on the 0.0 to 1.0 pass-rate scale. If champion_variant_id is null this should equal prior_champion_score.

prior_champion_score.description: Score of the incumbent champion entering this round on the 0.0 to 1.0 pass-rate scale. Used with champion_score to compute the uplift the new champion must clear.

sigma_gate_passed.description: True if the candidate champion beat the prior champion by at least the configured sigma threshold (statistical significance gate).

cost_gate_passed.description: True if the candidate champion stayed within the configured per-task token and wall-clock budget (cost gate).

comparison_sql.description: The exact SQL query executed against the benchmarks SQLite database to compute champion_score and rank variants. Preserved verbatim for reproducibility and audit.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp marking when the orchestrator wrote this record, for example 2026-04-23T10:42:07Z.

variants_evaluated.description: List of variant IDs that were actually executed and scored in this round. Each entry should match the variant_id pattern used by variant-runner-return.schema.json.

total_tokens.description: Total tokens consumed across every variant-runner and task-runner spawned in this round, summed from SQLite rows.

total_wall_clock_sec.description: Total wall-clock seconds elapsed from orchestrator start to orchestrator exit for this round.
